diagrams.title: FTP Client-Server Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the two-connection model of FTP with control and data connections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding FTP's dual-connection design and how commands and data flow separately

diagrams.title: Active FTP Mode
diagrams.description: Shows how in Active mode the server initiates the data connection to the client
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why Active FTP has issues with NAT/firewalls and when to use it

diagrams.title: Passive FTP Mode
diagrams.description: Shows how in Passive mode the client initiates both connections to the server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why Passive FTP is more firewall-friendly and preferred in modern networks

diagrams.title: FTP Response Code Categories
diagrams.description: Visual hierarchy of FTP response codes grouped by first digit
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing and understanding FTP response codes for troubleshooting
